title: Agent Run Record
description: Defines the execution telemetry, approvals, blocked actions, and tool-call actions of an autonomous agent run for runtime auditing.

id.description: Unique identifier of the agent run (e.g. run_1234).

agent_name.description: Name or classification identifier of the autonomous agent.

task_goal.description: Primary goal or objective assigned to the agent.

decision_type.description: Classification of the event, approval, or blocked action.

justification.description: Operator notes, event context, or justification description.

decisions.description: Timeline of operational events, approvals, blocked actions, and operator notes recorded during execution.

tool_calls.description: List of system or external tool call actions executed by the agent.

token_count.description: Total model tokens consumed during this operational run.

status.description: Operational exit status of the agent task.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the agent run was initialized.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for metadata extensions.
